About IndianSurgicals

Your trusted partner for medical equipment supply across India

Who We Are

Leading wholesale supplier of medical equipment

IndianSurgicals supports clinics, hospitals, labs, and procurement teams with a wide range of medical equipment. Share your requirements (product, quantity, city) on WhatsApp or call during working hours for pricing and availability. Images and specifications on this website are for reference—final specifications depend on model and stock availability.

With years of experience in the healthcare supply industry, we understand the unique challenges faced by hospitals, clinics, and procurement teams. Our commitment to quality, competitive pricing, and reliable service has made us a preferred choice for medical equipment sourcing across Delhi NCR and major Indian cities.

14+ Product Categories
90+ Product Types
< 24h Quote Response
All Major Indian Cities

What We Supply

Comprehensive range of medical equipment for healthcare facilities

🔪

Surgical Instruments

Precision surgical tools for minor and major surgeries. Scalpels, forceps, scissors, and more.

24 products 🛏️

Hospital Furniture

Quality hospital beds, patient trolleys, cabinets, and furniture for healthcare facilities.

18 products 🩺

Diagnostic Equipment

Essential diagnostic tools including stethoscopes, BP monitors, thermometers, and more.

32 products 🏥

OT Equipment

Operation theatre essentials - surgical tables, operating lights, monitors, and anesthesia equipment.

15 products 💓

ICU Equipment

Critical care equipment including ventilators, patient monitors, and infusion systems.

20 products 🧘

Physiotherapy

Rehabilitation and physiotherapy equipment for patient recovery and physical therapy.

16 products

Quality and Sourcing

Our commitment to quality

  • Direct partnerships with certified manufacturers
  • Strict quality inspection before dispatch
  • Complete product certification and warranty support
  • Traceable supply chain for all medical equipment

How We Support Procurement

Making sourcing easy

  • Competitive bulk pricing with GST invoice
  • Quick quote turnaround within 24 working hours
  • Pan-India dispatch with tracking support
  • Dedicated support for hospital and clinic procurement teams
